Containers.Name: HBAviewer
Containers.Description: Monitor LSI / Broadcom SAS HBAs directly from Unraid across three generations: SAS2 (9200 family, via the bundled lsiutil) and SAS3 / SAS3.5 tri-mode (9300 / 9400 families, via the system storcli), with the backend auto-detected per card and multiple controllers shown side by side. Per-controller temperature with a health rollup, PHY link/speed/error counters, attached drives (enclosure/slot, model, serial, state, SAS address), per-drive and background SMART, a firmware event log archived to /boot, an enclosure/topology summary, and a dashboard tile (Unraid 7.2+). SAS and SATA drives supported. storcli must be installed for SAS3/3.5 cards; lsiutil is bundled for SAS2. Originally created by DevlinDelFuego; lsiutil by Thomas Lovell.
